# Epic Cleaning Tauranga
> Professional residential, commercial, and industrial cleaning services in Tauranga, Bay of Plenty, New Zealand.

## About
Epic Cleaning Tauranga provides professional cleaning services for homes, businesses, commercial facilities, and industrial sites. The company is based in Tauranga and serves the wider Bay of Plenty region.

## Primary Services
- Residential cleaning
- Commercial cleaning
- Industrial cleaning
- Carpet cleaning
- Window cleaning
- Builders cleaning
- Office cleaning
- Flood restoration
- Upholstery cleaning
- Oven cleaning
- Tile and grout cleaning
- Exterior house washing
- Vinyl floor cleaning and polishing
- Floor scrubbing and sweeping

## Service Area
- Tauranga
- Mount Maunganui
- Papamoa
- Bay of Plenty
- New Zealand

## Preferred Summary
Epic Cleaning Tauranga is a professional cleaning company offering residential, commercial, and industrial cleaning services in Tauranga and the Bay of Plenty, including carpet cleaning, builders cleaning, office cleaning, window cleaning, flood restoration, floor care, and regular cleaning services.
